hero.name: Mohamed Iyed Touati
hero.heading: Hello I am
hero.description: I'm a developer Software Engineer passionate about building seamless digital worlds. With 3+ Years in Flutter and 2+ Years in .NET, I love turning complex problems into simple, powerful solutions that users actually enjoy.

details.title: JCI Organization Hub

details.title: JCI A Member Operations
details.description: Architected an enterprise-level operational hub for JCI, integrating advanced Human Resources automation with high-precision project lifecycle tracking. Leveraged the React ecosystem and Supabase's real-time Postgres capabilities to streamline internal governance and drastically reduce manual administrative overhead.

allExperience.companyDescription: Successfully architected and deployed a comprehensive internal ecosystem using React and Supabase. Engineered high-performance modules for Project & Activity Management, while developing a sophisticated Human Resources portal and integrated Member Management system, significantly streamlining organizational operations.

Successfully engineered a large-scale Organization Management mobile application using Flutter. Implemented a highly scalable architecture to support heavy features, integrated complex state management, and optimized real-time database syncing, significantly enhancing administrative workflows.

Developed a mission-critical medical support application using React Native, specifically designed to integrate with IoT wearable devices like smart rings. Engineered real-time health monitoring features and automated alert systems, focusing on data precision and patient-centric UX.

Drove the product lifecycle of a flagship automotive application by crafting premium Flutter interfaces from complex Figma prototypes. Optimized complex widget trees for maximum performance, ensuring 60fps smooth animations.

allTestimonial.reviewText: Planned community strategy every 3 months, worked with a 3-person team, and created and scheduled social media content to drive engagement and growth.
